# nxt-dropzone-wrapper documentation

> Angular wrapper library for Dropzone

> Generated by compodoc 2.0.0 at 2026-07-10T19:50:11.630Z, llm-md export.

## Components

### DropzoneComponent

File: `src/lib/dropzone.component.ts`
Selector: `nxt-dropzone`

Inputs:
- `config: DropzoneConfig` — Custom config to override the global defaults
- `disabled: boolean = false` — Disables / detaches Dropzone from the element
- `message: string = 'Click or drag files to upload'` — Message to show for the user on the upload area
- `placeholder: string = ''` — Placeholder image to be shown as the upload area
- `useDropzoneClass: boolean = true` — Use 'dropzone' class (use provided default styles)

Outputs:
- `addedFile: Dropzone.DropzoneFile`
- `addedFiles: Dropzone.DropzoneFile`
- `canceled: Dropzone.DropzoneFile`
- `canceledMultiple: Dropzone.DropzoneFile[]`
- `complete: Dropzone.DropzoneFile`
- `completeMultiple: Dropzone.DropzoneFile[]`
- `dragEnd: DragEvent`
- `dragEnter: DragEvent`
- `dragLeave: DragEvent`
- `dragOver: DragEvent`
- `dragStart: DragEvent`
- `drop: DragEvent`
- `error: [Dropzone.DropzoneFile, string | Error]`
- `errorMultiple: [Dropzone.DropzoneFile[], string | Error]`
- `init: Dropzone`
- `maxFilesExceeded: Dropzone.DropzoneFile`
- `maxFilesReached: Dropzone.DropzoneFile[]`
- `paste: DragEvent`
- `processing: Dropzone.DropzoneFile`
- `processingMultiple: Dropzone.DropzoneFile[]`
- `queueComplete: void`
- `removedFile: Dropzone.DropzoneFile`
- `reset: void`
- `sending: [Dropzone.DropzoneFile, XMLHttpRequest, FormData]`
- `sendingMultiple: [Dropzone.DropzoneFile[], XMLHttpRequest, FormData]`
- `success: [Dropzone.DropzoneFile, Object | string]`
- `successMultiple: Dropzone.DropzoneFile[]`
- `thumbnail: [Dropzone.DropzoneFile, string]`
- `totalUploadProgress: [number, number, number]`
- `uploadProgress: [Dropzone.DropzoneFile, number, number]`

Properties:
- `directiveRef: unknown = viewChild(DropzoneDirective)`

## Directives

### DropzoneDirective

File: `src/lib/dropzone.directive.ts`
Selector: `[nxtDropzone]`

Inputs:
- `nxtDropzone: DropzoneConfig = undefined` — Can be used to provide optional custom config
- `disabled: boolean = false`

Outputs:
- `addedFile: Dropzone.DropzoneFile`
- `addedFiles: Dropzone.DropzoneFile`
- `canceled: Dropzone.DropzoneFile`
- `canceledMultiple: Dropzone.DropzoneFile[]`
- `complete: Dropzone.DropzoneFile`
- `completeMultiple: Dropzone.DropzoneFile[]`
- `dragEnd: DragEvent`
- `dragEnter: DragEvent`
- `dragLeave: DragEvent`
- `dragOver: DragEvent`
- `dragStart: DragEvent`
- `drop: DragEvent`
- `error: [Dropzone.DropzoneFile, string | Error]`
- `errorMultiple: [Dropzone.DropzoneFile[], string | Error]`
- `init: Dropzone`
- `maxFilesExceeded: Dropzone.DropzoneFile`
- `maxFilesReached: Dropzone.DropzoneFile[]`
- `paste: DragEvent`
- `processing: Dropzone.DropzoneFile`
- `processingMultiple: Dropzone.DropzoneFile[]`
- `queueComplete: void`
- `removedFile: Dropzone.DropzoneFile`
- `reset: void`
- `sending: [Dropzone.DropzoneFile, XMLHttpRequest, FormData]`
- `sendingMultiple: [Dropzone.DropzoneFile[], XMLHttpRequest, FormData]`
- `success: [Dropzone.DropzoneFile, Object | string]`
- `successMultiple: Dropzone.DropzoneFile[]`
- `thumbnail: [Dropzone.DropzoneFile, string]`
- `totalUploadProgress: [number, number, number]`
- `uploadProgress: [Dropzone.DropzoneFile, number, number]`

### DropzoneListeners

File: `src/lib/dropzone.interfaces.ts`

Outputs:
- `addedFile: Dropzone.DropzoneFile`
- `addedFiles: Dropzone.DropzoneFile`
- `canceled: Dropzone.DropzoneFile`
- `canceledMultiple: Dropzone.DropzoneFile[]`
- `complete: Dropzone.DropzoneFile`
- `completeMultiple: Dropzone.DropzoneFile[]`
- `dragEnd: DragEvent`
- `dragEnter: DragEvent`
- `dragLeave: DragEvent`
- `dragOver: DragEvent`
- `dragStart: DragEvent`
- `drop: DragEvent`
- `error: [Dropzone.DropzoneFile, string | Error]`
- `errorMultiple: [Dropzone.DropzoneFile[], string | Error]`
- `init: Dropzone`
- `maxFilesExceeded: Dropzone.DropzoneFile`
- `maxFilesReached: Dropzone.DropzoneFile[]`
- `paste: DragEvent`
- `processing: Dropzone.DropzoneFile`
- `processingMultiple: Dropzone.DropzoneFile[]`
- `queueComplete: void`
- `removedFile: Dropzone.DropzoneFile`
- `reset: void`
- `sending: [Dropzone.DropzoneFile, XMLHttpRequest, FormData]`
- `sendingMultiple: [Dropzone.DropzoneFile[], XMLHttpRequest, FormData]`
- `success: [Dropzone.DropzoneFile, Object | string]`
- `successMultiple: Dropzone.DropzoneFile[]`
- `thumbnail: [Dropzone.DropzoneFile, string]`
- `totalUploadProgress: [number, number, number]`
- `uploadProgress: [Dropzone.DropzoneFile, number, number]`

## Interfaces

### DropzoneConfig

File: `src/lib/dropzone.interfaces.ts`
Extends: `Dropzone.DropzoneOptions`

Properties:
- `autoReset?: number` — Time in ms until input resets after a successful upload
- `cancelReset?: number` — Time in ms until input resets after cancelled upload
- `errorReset?: number` — Time in ms until input resets after upload error

## Public functions

- `provideDropzoneConfig(config: DropzoneConfig)`
  Defined in `src/lib/dropzone.interfaces.ts`

## Public variables

- `NXT_DROPZONE_CONFIG: unknown = new InjectionToken<DropzoneConfig>('NXT_DROPZONE_CONFIG')`
  Defined in `src/lib/dropzone.interfaces.ts`
